<!--
Thanks for contributing to plushie-rust! A short description of what
the change does and why helps reviewers. Keep the summary focused on
the "why"; the diff shows the "what".
-->

## Summary

<!-- What changes, and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `just preflight` passes locally
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` `[Unreleased]` section updated for any user-visible
      change (feature, fix, breaking change, deprecation)
- [ ] Breaking changes are called out under a "Breaking changes" heading
- [ ] Tests added or updated where the change warrants it
- [ ] Docs updated where the change warrants it
